title: premna serratifolia
intro: Premna serratifolia, also known as Indian bay leaf or West Indian bay, is a tropical plant native to the Indian subcontinent and parts of Southeast Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, which include antibacterial and anti-inflammatory activities. The health benefits associated with Premna serratifolia include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and provide relief from digestive problems. Premna serratifolia can be prepared as an herbal tea or infused in oil to extract its medicinal properties.
